overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's corporate district. The player navigates bustling sidewalks lined with towering glass skyscrapers, massive digital billboards, and neon-lit structures while pedestrians and vehicles move through the sunlit urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial boulevard with massive digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk past digital billboards and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair standing near the Kiroshi billboard looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: large curved digital billboard displaying Kiroshi Optics advertisement with teal neon accents
tall vertical digital screen showing Nochnies brand advertisement
distinctive twisted glass tower with reflective blue-tinted windows dominating the skyline
multi-level highway structure with concrete pillars and teal neon lighting
tall palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide sunlit sidewalk in a futuristic commercial district. The player walks past massive digital billboards for Kiroshi Optics and Nochnies while a distinctive twisted glass skyscraper rises in the distance. Palm trees line the street to the left where moderate traffic flows on the elevated highway ramps.

events.description: turning left to cross the wide street intersection
camera tilts upward to look up at the towering skyscrapers
turning right onto the new sidewalk heading toward the SECHO bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection, pausing to admire the towering architecture, then turning right onto a new street

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large overhead pedestrian bridge with illuminated SECHO signage spanning the street ahead
tall structure covered in multiple digital screens displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player turns left to cross a major intersection, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. Mid-segment, the camera pans upward to reveal the imposing height of the twisted glass skyscraper against the blue sky. After turning right, the SECHO pedestrian bridge becomes visible ahead, spanning the street with its prominent illuminated signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the SECHO pedestrian bridge
passing the escalator entrance with glowing teal neon lights on the right

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the SECHO bridge alongside other pedestrians, passing the escalator entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead under the bridge

entered.detail: staircase and escalator entrance with glass sides leading up to the pedestrian bridge
tall cylindrical pillars with bright teal neon lighting flanking the escalator
upper level walkway with glass railings and potted plants visible above the escalator

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive SECHO pedestrian bridge, the environment becomes semi-covered with the bridge structure overhead. To the right, an escalator entrance glows with teal neon light pillars leading up to an elevated terrace. The sidewalk continues forward with moderate foot traffic moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza intersection with distinctive blue paving

events.description: exiting the covered bridge area into the open plaza with blue painted crosswalk
crossing the blue painted intersection while a blue sports car drives past

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide blue-painted intersection among other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving through the intersection
pedestrian in red jacket crossing from right to left

entered.detail: distinctive bright blue painted crosswalk and plaza area with yellow striped borders
massive digital screen displaying advertisements on the side of a building
modern building with dark glass windows and purple neon trim

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the SECHO bridge, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza with distinctive blue painted paving. The player crosses the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians while a blue sports car drives past. Large digital billboards and futuristic buildings with neon accents line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban sidewalk with neon-accented retaining wall

events.description: entering the narrower sidewalk corridor with the dark patterned wall on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk beside a dark neon-trimmed wall, following pedestrians toward the distant city gate

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall dark wall with geometric pattern and continuous teal neon light strip running along its base
large architectural archway structure visible in the distance marking the end of the street
pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with glass sides

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a narrower sidewalk bordered by a distinctive dark wall with glowing teal neon trim on the right. The street opens ahead toward a distant architectural archway gate, with an elevated walkway crossing overhead. Sparse pedestrian traffic walks ahead as vehicles continue to pass on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit corporate district that transitions from wide, open boulevards into a structured urban plaza and finally toward a distant architectural gateway. It begins on a broad sidewalk lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards, moving past a distinctive twisted glass skyscraper that looms in the distance. As the camera turns to cross a major intersection, it pans upward to capture the skyscraper's imposing height before shifting focus toward the illuminated signage of the SECHO pedestrian bridge. The scene then moves beneath the bridge's semi-covered structure, passing teal neon light pillars at an escalator entrance before emerging into a bright plaza with blue painted paving and passing sports cars. Finally, the path narrows along a dark wall with glowing teal trim, leading the camera forward under an elevated walkway toward a distant archway gate.
